decision_commentary: Completeness 5: all 11 programmed space types present with name, qty, and size_sqm. Special features (medical gas system rooms, mechanical rooms) addressed in assumptions with 90 sqm addition. total_sqm = 1,590 is present. Accuracy 5: math verified — 10×20=200, 120, 80, 60, 150, 40, 60, 80, 4×15=60, 400, 250 = 1,500 programmed sqm + 90 mechanical = 1,590 total. Matches stated total. Clarity 5: matrix is self-contained and readable as a standalone document; notes per space provide context without requiring back-reference. COFEPRIS NOM references per space add professional credibility. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: produced concurrently with Sol's site readiness work, before DG-03. Decision_readiness 5: assumptions section documents all decisions including Rayos-X radiation shielding exclusion flag, landscape exclusion, and specialized system inclusions. Marcela has full context. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
celia_routing_notes: DG-03: decision=approve, route_to=Tomás (dispatch Tomás for commercial_health_center SOW). All 11 payload fields present.
